name: RMW - M16A2
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - The A2 one… used the Gulf War… in one of the Gulf Wars. But its pretty iconic of the era, so i cant be mad at it too much. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
